sql_array: CREATE PROCEDURE start_my_instance() { DECLARE access_key, sec_token, p_name VARCHAR; access_key := 'AKIAJI7ZL427TI5EDF5A'; sec_token := 'CGI/UMaXf2LRUctaj/HGJ57UNy/t7fNCshh8wpJg'; p_name := 'my_instance_of_linux'; DB.DBA.AMAZON_START_INSTANCE(access_key, p_name, sec_token); };
UPDATE instances SET status = 'running' WHERE instance_name = 'my_instance_of_linux';
SELECT instance_name, status FROM instances WHERE status = 'running';
